/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libmy_service_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libmy_service_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/my_service_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/my_service_interfaces/srv/detail/reset_counter__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib:/home/omi/my_service_ws/build/my_service_interfaces: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libmy_service_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.29 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
